name: 80D tax benefit for health + parent premium
description: User asks about 80D deduction for self and senior parents

input.message: I am 38 and pay ₹22,000 for my family health insurance and ₹35,000 for my parents' health insurance (they are 65+). How much 80D deduction can I claim and how much tax will I save? I am in 30% tax bracket.

notes: Self (< 60): limit ₹25K → deductible ₹22K. Parents (≥ 60): limit ₹50K → deductible ₹35K. Total deduction = ₹57K. Tax saved = ₹57,000 × 30% = ₹17,100. Must mention new regime has no 80D benefit.
